creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Tested and works, but contains unwanted and unneeded dependency on gmake 
port.

Acceptable if committer could modify patch to remove line

USE_GMAKE=      yes

Thanks!

 intelligence of the smartest bears and the dumbest tourists.'
